title: Fix slow database query performance
original_text: Fixed slow database query performance issue. The user list query was taking 10+ seconds due to missing indexes. Added composite indexes on frequently queried columns. Optimized JOIN operations. Implemented query result caching. Refactored N+1 query problem. Added query performance monitoring. Result: query time reduced from 10s to 200ms.
expected_subject: fix(perf): optimize slow database queries with indexes
expected_body_lines: - Add composite indexes on frequently queried columns
- Validation: query time reduced from 10s to 200ms
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(perf): optimize slow database queries with indexes"
